commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Cried out. Paralipomenon add, to the Lord, and he helped him, and turned them away from him. The Jews (in Seder. ) acknowledge the same thing; and thus it was known that Josaphat was not the king of Israel, who would rather have invoked Baal. (Menochius) Perhaps he also declared the truth, and who he was, when he saw the Syrians surround him, crying, This is the king of Israel. (2 Paralipomenon xviii. ) (Tirinus).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
